case_title: HATTI FLANAGAN et al VS. THAKOR, KIRANSINH A/K/A THAKOR KIRANSIHN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-02-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
